mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_history (org_name, building_name, room_num, item_name, standard_name, standard_price, qty, receivable, deduction, paid_in, payment_balance, status, user_name, company_id, create_by, create_time, type) values
(#{item.orgName}, #{item.buildingName}, #{item.roomNum}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.standardName}, #{item.standardPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.receivable}, #{item.deduction}, #{item.paidIn}, #{item.paymentBalance}, #{item.status}, #{item.userName}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.type})
mapper.update: update pr_import_history a left join pr_standard b on a.standard_name = b.name and a.standard_price = b.standard_price and a.company_id = b.company_id set a.standard_id = b.id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.type = '0' and a.create_by = #{create} and length(a.standard_name) > 0
mapper.select: select * from pr_import_history where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and standard_id is null and length(standard_name) > 0 limit 500
select count(1) from pr_import_history where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_history where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into pr_transaction_record (id, company_id, org_id, house_id, standard_id, standard_price, qty, receivable, deduction, paid_in, payment_balance, create_by, create_time) select replace(uuid(), '-', ''), company_id, org_id, house_id, standard_id, standard_price, qty, receivable, deduction, paid_in, payment_balance, create_by, now() from pr_import_history where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0'
mapper.delete: delete from pr_import_history where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create}
